overall.description: First-person driving gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring a vehicle journey through a futuristic neon-lit city. The drive transitions between open sunlit streets, covered highway underpasses, and urban canyons with parking structures, showcasing high-quality ray-traced lighting and cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street approaching elevated highway overpass

events.description: entering the shadow of the elevated highway overpass from open street

agents.ego_description: driving through the futuristic city street approaching the highway underpass, maintaining steady speed behind traffic

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining consistent distance

entered.detail: large concrete and steel highway structure spanning across the road ahead
tall futuristic glass building with reflective facade on the left side of the street
tall futuristic glass building with geometric patterns on the right side
futuristic vehicle dashboard with green holographic displays and red accent lighting
bright neon advertising signs on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person driving view through a futuristic cyberpunk city street. The vehicle approaches an elevated highway overpass with tall glass skyscrapers lining both sides. The dashboard displays holographic green readouts. A red sports car drives ahead in the same lane as the camera enters the shadow of the overpass around the 10-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass with industrial steel infrastructure

events.description: dramatic reduction in natural light as vehicle enters the covered highway underpass
approaching bright exit from the covered section, strong backlighting visible ahead

agents.ego_description: driving steadily through the shadowed highway underpass, following the red vehicle ahead toward the bright exit

notable_agents.action: pedestrians walking along the elevated sidewalk visible through gaps in the structure

entered.detail: concrete underside of the elevated highway creating a tunnel-like effect
exposed orange steel support beams and girders on the left side of the underpass
smooth concrete retaining wall on the right side of the roadway
raised walkway with railings visible on the right side above the concrete wall

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels through the covered highway underpass, where natural light is dramatically reduced and replaced with artificial lighting reflecting off concrete walls. Industrial steel girders line the left side while an elevated pedestrian walkway is visible on the right. The segment ends as the vehicle approaches the bright exit, creating strong backlighting effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with pedestrian crossings and tropical vegetation

events.description: exiting the covered highway into bright open plaza with full sunlight exposure
camera pans right to observe pedestrians crossing the street alongside the vehicle
camera returns to forward-facing position as vehicle continues through the plaza

agents.ego_description: driving through the sunlit urban plaza, briefly panning the camera right to observe pedestrians crossing before returning to forward view

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street from right to left in front of the vehicle
red vehicle continuing ahead through the plaza intersection

entered.detail: open paved pedestrian area with people walking alongside the roadway
tropical palm trees lining the right side of the plaza area
futuristic pedestrian bridge spanning across the road ahead
bright yellow concrete dividers separating the road from the pedestrian area
modern building with vertical white stripes and large glass windows

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from the underpass into a bright sunlit urban plaza with palm trees and pedestrian activity. The camera briefly pans right around 32 seconds to show pedestrians crossing the street before returning forward. The environment features futuristic architecture with an overhead pedestrian walkway and yellow concrete barriers separating the road from walking areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban canyon with multi-level parking structures and digital advertising

events.description: entering covered section with multi-level parking garage structures visible on the left
passing large holographic advertising displays on the right side of the roadway

agents.ego_description: driving through the covered urban canyon, passing parking structures and holographic billboards while maintaining steady progress

notable_agents.action: pedestrians walking along the sidewalk adjacent to the parking structure

entered.detail: large multi-story concrete parking structure with open levels on the left side
large floating holographic display showing colorful advertisements
solid concrete covering over the roadway creating a tunnel effect
large digital screen displaying animated content on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered urban canyon with a multi-level parking garage dominating the left side. The roadway is flanked by concrete walls and illuminated by holographic advertising billboards. Pedestrians are visible walking along the right sidewalk as the vehicle progresses through this sheltered section with mixed natural and artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed covered roadway approaching building entrance with security features

events.description: entering deeper covered section with reduced natural light and prominent artificial illumination

agents.ego_description: driving through the final enclosed section toward a building entrance or security checkpoint, with no pedestrians visible

entered.detail: smooth gray concrete walls enclosing both sides of the roadway
building with distinctive green-tinted glass windows on the right side
security barriers and gate structure visible at the end of the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle driving through a narrow enclosed concrete tunnel with green-tinted building facades visible on the right. The environment is more confined with solid concrete walls on both sides, approaching what appears to be a security gate or building entrance at the end of the covered roadway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person driving perspective that transitions from open city streets through a series of oppressive concrete underpasses and sheltered urban canyons. It begins on a sunlit boulevard lined with glass skyscrapers, where the vehicle follows a red sports car and holographic dashboard readouts before plunging into the deep shadows of a highway overpass. As the camera moves through this dim industrial corridor of steel girders and concrete, the lighting shifts dramatically until the vehicle emerges back into the bright glare of a sunlit plaza filled with palm trees and pedestrians. The scene then shifts back into a sheltered urban canyon dominated by a multi-level parking garage and glowing holographic billboards, before finally narrowing into a confined concrete tunnel with green-tinted facades that leads toward a security gate.
